text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
It's time for the Arima Kinen, the race of all races!
This is a dream race with all the best runners of
the era, and I'm more than ready to throw my hat
into the ring!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
And ALL my rivals are here! This race is gonna be
intense!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
With me being a formidable foe for Yaeno, and
her being one of my ultimate rivals, this race
really is gonna make our dreams come true!
